notes: v0.4.0 — Cloudflare AI Gateway support (HK 直連 Gemini work-around). NEW: 5th tab『Live Stream』using streamGenerateContent SSE — token-by-token output, configurable 1/2/3s frame interval, JPEG quality knob (default 60% to keep payload <200KB). AI Watch dropdown gets a new『Gemini 2.5 Flash (direct via AI Gateway)』option that bypasses Poe entirely (free up to 1500 RPD, then $0.10/$0.40 per million in/out tokens). Both CF AI Gateway token + Gemini API key bundled in plugin (internal-only). Pure-Ruby SSE chunk parser handles partial JSON, multi-line data:, keepalive comments, finishReason STOP. Direct path verified working from HK with HTTP 200 / 1.3-1.6s latency.
